page_title: EVANGELION:3.0+1.0 AVANT 1 (First 10 min 40 sec 00 f) 0706 Edition BGM Collection
text:
is a digital single by Shirō Sagisu. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOHR-62, it was released on 28 August 2019. https://vgmdb.net/album/89795
